scripts.still:cover: remotion still src/index.ts BranchCover public/output/cover.png --frame=30 --browser-executable="/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome"
scripts.still:frame: remotion still src/index.ts BranchVideo public/output/frame.png --frame=210 --browser-executable="/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome"
scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts BranchVideo public/output/branch-video.mp4 --codec=h264 --concurrency=1 --browser-executable="/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome"
